aeo_readiness.summary: Fine Remodeling has a solid foundation for AI assistant visibility, but lacks structured data and conversational content to maximize AI citations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common queries and solutions.
Expand content to include HowTo guides for common remodeling tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying them as a top solution.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to home remodeling services in Wilmington, Delaware.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating detailed HowTo content and showcasing certifications to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing your online presence for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them due to lack of structured data and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance their online presence with schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to become a top AI-recommended choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, making immediate action crucial to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Optimize for Answer Engines Today!
opening_line: After analyzing your website and online presence, we found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven growth.
